description: You are the Royalties Manager at Neon Horizon Records. Prepare the Q3 2024 royalty statements using the raw streaming export at ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/q3_streaming_export.csv and save the final workbook to ~/Documents/Spreadsheets/royalty_statement_Q3.xlsx. The workbook must include a 'Rates' sheet with the following per-stream values: Tidal ($0.01250), Apple Music ($0.00735), Spotify ($0.00437), Amazon Music ($0.00402), and YouTube ($0.00069). On the main data sheet, calculate 'Gross_Royalty' using these rates, as well as 'Artist_Share' and 'Label_Share' (each 50% of the gross). Additionally, provide a 'Summary' sheet that aggregates the Total Gross Royalty by Platform and lists the Top 5 earning tracks by Total Gross Royalty.
